## Summary

- What changed?
- Why?

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `feat/*` or `fix/*`
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Tests added/updated if behavior changed
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes (backend)
- [ ] `pytest` passes (backend)
- [ ] `mypy app` passes (backend)

## Validation

Describe how you verified the change locally.
